query: TIL — fastembed downloads its model on first call, which makes the first `vestige embed --all` look hung. note that down
good to know: rusqlite bundled mode pins to whatever sqlite version ships with the crate, not the system one. worth jotting down so we don't get confused next upgrade
the bug was a UTF-8 boundary truncation issue in source-snippet capping — we were slicing on bytes inside a multi-byte char. record the root cause
this match arm in derive_representations is a code smell — same pattern duplicated 4 times for each MemoryType. flag it as a refactor candidate
careful — Cargo's --workspace with a -p still re-runs the whole workspace for shared deps. non-obvious. note it
TODO that I want to actually remember between sessions: replace the fake embedding provider tests with property-based ones once proptest is added to the workspace
interesting — the FTS5 rank function in sqlite returns negative scores by default, you have to negate them for sane sorting. heads up
we'll go with FTS5 over a custom tokenizer, settled
I prefer trailing commas in struct definitions, always
open question: do we want a daemon mode in v0.5
search memory for what we said about embeddings
give me the project context pack
restore mem_01H8XYZ — we forgot it by accident
ok cool, that makes sense, let's move on
